author: Daniel Klic
message:
fix: #2199 GraphQL 500 when fragment definitions precede the operation (#2203)

GraphQL clients (Apollo, urql, Relay) emit fragment definitions before the
operation in the query document. GraphQLController assumed the operation was
the first definition and blindly cast getDefinitions().get(0) to
OperationDefinition, throwing a ClassCastException (HTTP 500) for any real
client query using named fragment spreads.

Select the operation via getDefinitionsOfType(OperationDefinition.class),
honoring the request operationName when present. Also harden two sibling
casts that assumed a top-level selection is always a Field: guard the
introspection check with an instanceof, and flatten top-level fragment
spreads via collectFields() before processing each queried field.

Add a GraphQLControllerIT case asserting a query whose fragment definition
precedes the operation returns 200.

Signed-off-by: Daniel Klíč <daniel.klic96@gmail.com>

author: Harish R S
message:
fix: replace break with continue in getNoContentRequestResponsePair() (#2189)

When an x-microcks-refs example is missing path parameters for a URI_PARTS
or URI_ELEMENTS dispatcher, the previous break exited the entire iterator
loop, silently dropping all remaining valid examples. Using continue skips
only the incomplete example and processes the rest.

Fixes #2188

Signed-off-by: Harish R S <harishrs21082006@gmail.com>

author: Harish R S
message:
fix: run Keycloak token refresh outside Angular zone to avoid unnecessary change detection (#2166)

* fix: run Keycloak token refresh outside Angular zone to avoid unnecessary change detection

Wrapping the periodic token refresh setInterval in NgZone.runOutsideAngular()
prevents Angular from triggering change detection every 30 seconds when
no UI-relevant state has changed.

Fixes #2124

Signed-off-by: Harishrs2006 <harishrs21082006@gmail.com>

* fix: pass NgZone to KeycloakAuthenticationService in factory provider

AuthenticationServiceFactory was manually instantiating the service
without the NgZone argument, causing a build failure. Updated the
factory function and deps array to include NgZone.

Signed-off-by: Harishrs2006 <harishrs21082006@gmail.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Harishrs2006 <harishrs21082006@gmail.com>

author: Harish R S
message:
fix: add null check for GenericResource payload in ResourceController (#2163)

getPayload() can return null on a GenericResource, causing a silent
NullPointerException at reference.append() that was swallowed by a
generic catch block. Added an explicit null guard to handle this case
properly with a descriptive warning log.

Signed-off-by: Harishrs2006 <harishrs21082006@gmail.com>

author: Harish R S
message:
fix: prevent StringIndexOutOfBoundsException in HARImporter for URLs without file extension (#2158)

URLs without a '.' character (e.g. /api/users) caused lastIndexOf('.') to
return -1, making substring(-1) throw StringIndexOutOfBoundsException and
failing the entire HAR import. Guard added to treat extension-less URLs as
valid API entries.

Fixes #<ISSUE_NUMBER>

Signed-off-by: Harishrs2006 <harishrs21082006@gmail.com>
